summary: V9.1 frontend-only test PASS. Verified new GasChronologicalStepper (10 steps) replaces ad-hoc GasServicePipeline in Studio Gaze. Stripe publishable key added to .env without overwriting REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All required data-testids present. V9.0 rebranding regression smoke passed.

tests_executed.detail: data-testid='gas-chronological-stepper' rendered at top of /gaze-naturale/gp_e79e2810cc64b5b4 in place of old GasServicePipeline

10/10 step testids found: stepper-date-proiect, stepper-date-tehnice, stepper-avize, stepper-dtac, stepper-ac, stepper-pth, stepper-avize-finale, stepper-dispozitie-santier, stepper-carte-tehnica, stepper-receptie
Demo project gp_e79e2810cc64b5b4 (302 fields) shows '10/10 finalizate' and '100% progres total' — all stage criteria met, '✓ Toate etapele complete' label visible. Global progress bar at 100% width.

Phrases NOT present on Studio Gaze page: 'pachete ad-hoc', 'express dispatch', 'carte_legata', 'carte legata'. Note: literal string 'ad-hoc' matches the unrelated sidebar nav item 'Anunțuri ad-hoc' (Marketplace classifieds) and the landing-page Studio Gaze module card chip 'STRIPE AD-HOC' — these are unrelated to the removed gas service pipeline packages.
All 4 tabs present and counted=1: DATE OPERAȚIONALE, AVIZE HUB, REGISTRU CÂMPURI, INGINERIE
Landing shows 'Bine ai venit. Redesigning projects.' tagline, EP gradient logo in sidebar, Studio Gaze 33 documente card, 221 câmpuri counter, 5 module integrate grid intact

/app/frontend/.env contains both REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://github-push-test.preview.emergentagent.com AND REACT_APP_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=pk_live_51Thc7C... (backend URL preserved, Stripe key added cleanly)

/app/frontend/src/components/GasServicePipeline.jsx file still exists on disk but is no longer imported anywhere (grep confirms only the comment reference in GasChronologicalStepper.jsx). Safe to delete in a future cleanup pass.

action_items: (optional cleanup) Delete /app/frontend/src/components/GasServicePipeline.jsx since it is now unused dead code (still on disk but no imports). Not blocking.

(optional polish) Studio Gaze module card on Acasă landing still displays the chip 'STRIPE AD-HOC' (see PRODUS PRINCIPAL card). Since ad-hoc Stripe checkout was removed at user's explicit request, consider updating this chip label to reflect the new model (e.g., 'STRIPE PLANS' or removing it). Cosmetic only.
critical_code_review_comments: GasChronologicalStepper.stepCompletion() treats string '0' and numeric 0 as filled (truthy check is `v !== ''`) — correct behavior for numeric fields like debit; no issue.
Stepper has min-w-[1200px] horizontal scroll on viewports <xl which is acceptable (user asked for 10 etape orizontal sus).
Stripe publishable key is hardcoded committed to .env in cleartext — this is fine since pk_live_* is meant to be public, but ensure no SECRET key (sk_live_*) is ever committed.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing demo project gp_e79e2810cc64b5b4 (302 fields).
context_for_next_testing_agent: V9.1 delta verified end-to-end on the frontend. Stripe publishable key is in .env but no Stripe checkout flow has been wired in code yet (per STRIPE_PRICING_SETUP.md, products still need to be created in Stripe Dashboard by the user before any real checkout integration can be tested). If user/main agent wires the Stripe Checkout buttons next, retest payment buttons → Stripe redirect.
